description_long: This is a manual pallet jack, commonly used for moving pallets and heavy loads in warehouses, factories, and urban delivery settings. It features two long, parallel steel fork arms painted in a worn red color, designed to slide under pallets. The handle is black and ergonomically shaped, connected to a vertical metal shaft that controls the hydraulic lifting mechanism. The front of the pallet jack has two small wheels at the tips of the fork arms, while the rear has larger wheels near the base for maneuverability. The frame is robust and constructed primarily from metal, with visible bolts and joints for structural integrity. The surface shows signs of use, with some scuff marks and minor scratches, indicating it is a well-used industrial tool.
description: A red manual pallet jack with long steel fork arms, a black handle, and visible wheels for moving heavy loads. The surface is worn and shows signs of industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black handle, central shaft, and the two parallel fork arms extending forward with wheels visible at the tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and thickness of the fork arms, the hydraulic base, and the rear wheels beneath the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the fork arms, the central shaft, and the open space between the arms for pallet entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the fork arms, hydraulic base, and rear wheels from the other side.
attribute_fork_arms: Two long, parallel steel fork arms painted red, each with a rectangular cross-section, moderate thickness, and slightly beveled tips. The arms show visible wear and scuff marks, and have small wheels at the front ends for easy sliding under pallets.
attribute_overhead_guard: No overhead guard is present on this pallet jack.
attribute_mast: No vertical mast is present; the lifting mechanism is integrated into the base and fork arms, typical of manual pallet jacks.
attribute_operator_seat: There is no operator seat; operation is performed standing behind the handle.
attribute_warning_lights: No warning lights are visible on this pallet jack.
